code: import axios from"axios";const API=axios.create({baseURL:"http://localhost:5000/api"});API.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem("token");if(token){config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);}return config;});export const getAllAttendance=function(){let page=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:1;return API.get("/attendance",{params:{page}});};export const getMyAttendance=function(){let page=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:1;return API.get("/attendance/my-attendance",{params:{page}});};export const getTodayAttendance=()=>API.get("/attendance/today");export const checkIn=()=>API.post("/attendance/check-in");export const checkOut=()=>API.post("/attendance/check-out");export const getAttendanceStats=()=>API.get("/attendance/stats");
